title: State of the Estate in 2023-24
body: "The State of the Estate Report provides progress updates on improving the efficiency and sustainability of the government estate in accordance with the 2008 Climate Change Act. The Government Estate: Annual Data Publication report provides further property portfolio insights.  Please complete our user engagement survey. We are seeking your feedback regarding the State of the Estate, 2023-24 and Government Estate: Annual Data Publication, 2023-24. Your input is valuable to us as it helps to enhance our products and better meet the needs of our audience. "
